title: dus- #1418
definition:
1) prefix conveying the idea of difficulty, opposition,
    injuriousness, similar to our "mis-" or "un-" prefixes

 Since this is always used as a prefix, this Strong's number is not
 listed in the NT.
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) prefix conveying the idea of difficulty, opposition,
    injuriousness, similar to our "mis-" or "un-" prefixes

 Since this is always used as a prefix, this Strong's number is not
 listed in the NT.

    NASB:  like un- or mis- (as in unrest, misjudge), nullifies good sense or increases bad sense of a word.
